//: Primary tasks call `make` directly: use them when the window runs in a Linux context (the .devcontainer, Remote-WSL, or native Linux). The 'WSL host' and 'Docker' tasks are for driving a build from a plain Windows host window instead. The Makefile uses relative paths (../mDNSCore, ...), so it must be invoked with -C mDNSPosix from the repo root.

tasks.label: build: mdnsd (linux · TLS)
tasks.detail: make os=linux  → build/prod/mdnsd (default build with mbedTLS). Run in devcontainer / Remote-WSL / native Linux.

tasks.label: build: all (linux · TLS)
tasks.detail: make os=linux all  → daemon, libdns_sd, clients, example responders, NetMonitor

tasks.label: build: mdnsd DEBUG (linux · TLS)
tasks.detail: make os=linux DEBUG=1  → build/debug/mdnsd with MDNS_DEBUGMSGS=2

tasks.label: build: mdnsd (linux · no TLS)
tasks.detail: make os=linux tls=no  → build without mbedTLS (DNS Push/TLS disabled)

tasks.label: build: mdnsd (WSL host · linux · TLS)
tasks.detail: Drive the build from a plain Windows host window via WSL (needs the toolchain installed in the distro).

tasks.label: build: mdnsd (Docker · debian one-shot)
tasks.detail: Builds inside a throwaway debian container (installs toolchain each run — slow; prefer reopening in the .devcontainer for repeated use).
args: apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends build-essential bison flex libmbedtls-dev && make os=linux
